Digital Infrastructure

Open-Source, UNIX & Apple infrastructure for businesses of all sizes

Production-grade open-source, Linux, BSD, and Apple Business infrastructure for SMBs. NixOS, OpenBSD, FreeBSD, Nextcloud, and zero-touch Apple device deployment.
Digital Infrastructure for SMBs

Stop Paying Microsoft Licenses
for Software That Already Exists Free

We build production-grade open-source, UNIX, and Apple Business infrastructure that saves SMBs 40-70% on IT costs while giving you full control of your data.

Get Your Free Infrastructure Audit
Trusted by SMBs across Romania & the EU  |  100% open-source — no vendor lock-in
The Problem

Your IT Budget Is Being Drained by Licenses You Don't Need

Rising License Costs

Microsoft 365, Google Workspace, and Adobe subscriptions increase every year. A 50-person company spends EUR 30,000+/year just on basic productivity software.

Vendor Lock-In

Your data sits on someone else's servers, governed by their terms. If they change pricing or policies, you have no leverage and no exit plan.

No Control Over Data

GDPR requires you to know where your data is processed. With US cloud providers, your EU customer data may cross borders without your knowledge.

No In-House IT Team

You can't afford a full sysadmin team, so infrastructure decisions get made by whoever is least busy. Systems break, nobody knows why.

Mac Management Chaos

Your team uses Macs but nobody manages them centrally. No MDM, no security policies, no zero-touch deployment. New hires wait days to get set up.

NIS2 Compliance Pressure

EU regulations are tightening. You need documented infrastructure, access controls, and incident response capabilities you don't currently have.

The Solution

Infrastructure That Works for You, Not Against You

Three pillars of modern SMB infrastructure, deployed and managed by chen.ist.

Pillar 1

Open-Source Stack for Business

Replace expensive proprietary licenses with battle-tested open-source alternatives. We handle deployment, configuration, security hardening, and ongoing maintenance.

  • Nextcloud (files, calendar)
  • Collabora Online (docs)
  • Matrix/Element (chat)
  • Keycloak (SSO)
  • Prometheus + Grafana
  • PostgreSQL, MinIO
Pillar 2

UNIX Infrastructure

We build and manage servers, firewalls, and network appliances on proven UNIX operating systems. Whether you need a hardened OpenBSD firewall, a NixOS declarative fleet, or a traditional Linux server stack, we deliver infrastructure that is secure, reproducible, and maintainable.

  • NixOS (declarative, atomic)
  • Debian/Ubuntu (LTS)
  • RHEL/AlmaLinux (FIPS)
  • OpenBSD (secure firewall)
  • FreeBSD (ZFS, Jails)
  • NetBSD (embedded, IoT)
Pillar 3

Apple Business

We are early adopters and deployment partners for the new Apple Business platform, launching April 14, 2026. Apple Business replaces Apple Business Manager, Apple Business Essentials, and Apple Business Connect into a single, unified platform.

  • Built-in MDM
  • Zero-touch Blueprints
  • Business Email & Calendar
  • Brand Management
  • AppleCare+ for Business
  • Admin API integration
Why chen.ist

Built on Proven Technology, Delivered by Specialists

15+
Years in UNIX Systems
100%
Open-Source Stack
EU
Data Sovereignty
24/7
Monitoring Included

Reproducible Deployments

Every system we build is declared in code (NixOS, Ansible). If a server dies, we rebuild it identically in minutes, not days.

Open Source Guarantee

You own everything. If we part ways, you keep every configuration file, every server, every account. Zero lock-in to us, either.

Security-First Architecture

Every deployment includes hardened baselines, automated patching, encrypted backups, and firewall rules reviewed against CIS benchmarks.

Packages

Infrastructure Tailored to Your Team Size

All packages include deployment, hardening, monitoring, and ongoing support. Custom pricing based on your specific needs.

Starter

1-10 employees
Custom pricing based on scope
  • Apple Business setup + Blueprints
  • 1 Linux server (Debian/Ubuntu)
  • Nextcloud (files, contacts, calendar)
  • Business email on custom domain
  • Basic firewall (OpenBSD pf or UFW)
  • Automated backups (Restic)
  • Uptime monitoring
Get a Quote
Most Popular

Growth

11-50 employees
Custom pricing based on scope
  • Everything in Starter, plus:
  • Full Apple MDM with team grouping
  • OpenBSD dedicated firewall/VPN
  • Keycloak SSO across all systems
  • Matrix/Element team messaging
  • Collabora Online (document editing)
  • Prometheus + Grafana monitoring
  • Samba/AD bridging (if needed)
Book Free Consultation

Enterprise

50+ employees
Custom pricing based on scope
  • Everything in Growth, plus:
  • Apple Business Admin API integration
  • NixOS declarative multi-server fleet
  • FreeBSD ZFS storage cluster
  • High-availability configurations
  • Multi-site VPN mesh
  • Compliance baselines (NIS2, GDPR)
  • 24/7 monitoring + incident response
Contact Us

Apple Business Launches April 14, 2026

The new unified platform replaces Apple Business Manager, Apple Business Essentials, and Apple Business Connect. Companies that set up before launch get priority migration support. We are certified early-access deployment partners.
